source_jobs.title: Commercial Agronomist
source_jobs.description:
<p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Pivot Bio:&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:240,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="none"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">Fueled by an innovative drive and a deep understanding of microbiology, genomics, crop nutrition and agriculture, Pivot Bio is pioneering game-changing advances in fertilizer technology. Our first commercial product harnesses the power of&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW250411738 BCX0">naturally-occurring</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">&nbsp;microbes, modern gene editing and application technologies to provide nitrogen to crops.&nbsp; We&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun AdvancedProofingIssueV2Themed SCXW250411738 BCX0">are dedicated to providing</span>&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">new solutions</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">&nbsp;for farmers to improve yield as they work to help feed the world’s growing population. href="https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fonezero.medium.com%2Fhow-microbes-could-upend-americas-toxic-dependence-on-nitrogen-fertilizer-548451117a63&amp;data=05%7C02%7Csuzan.georges%40pivotbio.com%7C58455ae234f74711c91408dd460da77b%7C9cd8c009919e41cfba633d3b29c3beed%7C0%7C0%7C638743746640724364%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=VmN57d15ZCZfJgWYtmuPjSJ65pLE9lqgdgBG7eMfmDw%3D&amp;reserved=0" Our first commercial product harnesses the power of&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW250411738 BCX0">naturally-occurring</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">&nbsp;microbes, modern gene editing and application technologies to provide nitrogen to crops.&nbsp; We&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun AdvancedProofingIssueV2Themed SCXW250411738 BCX0">are dedicated to providing</span>&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">new solutions</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW250411738 BCX0">&nbsp;for farmers to improve yield as they work to help feed the world’s growing population.
